text.title: Meta Audience Targeting (3-Tier) Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply this methodology end-to-end.

step.name: verify-preconds
step.action: Confirm pixel firing, ICP defined, exclusion lists hashed.

step.name: build-custom
step.action: Stack 2-4 Custom audiences from pixel + IG + FB engagement.

step.name: build-lookalike
step.action: Build 1% LAL from quality source; optionally add 2-3% and 5-10% for scale.

step.name: wire-exclusions-and-advantage
step.action: Add exclusions; decide Advantage+ per gate (budget ≥ $100 + broad product).
